name: omarchy_commercial_guis
content:
Commercia GUIs 
Omarchy is mosty focused on providing free, open source software, but it's not reigious
about it. Sometimes the best soution is a commercia offering, and that's just fine. Here
are some of the options we provide an easy instaation for.
1Password 
Keeping your passwords in a password manager is a best practice. Douby so if you're
working with a team. And 1password is a great soution, which aso comes with a
command ine too for integrating key ookups in scripts.
You start 1Password with Super + Shift + /.
Typora 
Typora is a minima, distraction-free writing too in the same spirit as iA Writer for the Mac
and Windows. Like Obsidian, it uses Markdown for formatting, but in a way that's focused
on writing individua pieces or essays and very itte ese.
Best used in fu screen mode F11) for that totay immersive nothing-but-words ook.
It comes with a 15-day free tria, and is then a $15 one-time cost.
You start Typora using the appication auncher (Super + Space ).
Dropbox 
Dropbox is a great way to sync fies between machines whie keeping a backup in the
coud. To set it up, seect Insta > Service > Dropbox from the Omarchy menu.
Taiscae 
Taiscae is a mesh VPN that makes getting access to a your computers and servers over
the internet securey super simpe way. To set it up, seect Insta > Service > Taiscae
from the Omarchy menu.
Spotify 
Spotify is the word's most popuar streaming music service. And the Linux appication
provides everything you'd expect, incuding offine paying.
You start Spotify using Super + Shift + M.
Commercial GUIs · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/61/commercial-guis
